text.title: Progressive-disclosure anti-patterns
text.summary: Three failure modes that collapse the pyramid into a flat blob: oversized body, missing triggers, and inlined references.

antipattern.description: SKILL.md grows past ~500 lines because the author keeps adding examples, edge cases, and runbooks inline.
antipattern.reason: Activated body sits in context for the rest of the turn; bloated bodies bust prompt cache, raise per-call cost, and crowd out tool results.

rule.statement: If SKILL.md exceeds 500 lines, split it: move detailed examples into references/<topic>.md and link them from the body with a one-line "Read references/X.md when ..." pointer.
rule.rationale: References load lazily — the agent reads them only when the linked condition triggers, keeping average context flat as the skill grows.

antipattern.description: Description is one sentence of marketing copy ("comprehensive deployment automation skill").
antipattern.reason: Router cannot match — the user says "deploy faion.net", description has neither word, skill never activates.

rule.statement: Every domain term, command name, or verb the user might say MUST appear in the description; aim for 3-6 concrete trigger phrases minimum.
rule.rationale: Skill activation is essentially semantic search over descriptions — coverage of trigger surface determines hit rate.

section.title: Inlined references

antipattern.description: Pasting a 1500-line runbook, schema, or sample dataset directly into a fenced code block in SKILL.md.
antipattern.reason: Inlined files load on every activation, including sub-tasks that never use them — kills the second level's whole purpose.

example.code:
## Deploying to faion-net
For the full deploy procedure, Read `references/deploy-runbook.md`. For the rollback procedure, Read `references/rollback.md`.
example.note: Body stays small; only the relevant runbook loads on demand.

example.code:
## Deploying to faion-net
```bash # 850 lines of deploy steps inlined here ... ```
example.note: Every activation pays the 850-line tax even when the user just asked for status.

section.reference: Equipping agents for the real world with Agent Skills (Anthropic engineering blog).
